title: Living Leaderboard
tagline: A printed QR re-ranks the top JavaScript repos every time someone scans it.
holy_shit: It's just paper, but every scan recomputes a fresh top-10 leaderboard from a live public ranking feed — hash-verified, no server.
powered_by: /track extract cell + EvanLi/Github-Ranking Top100/JavaScript.md (public ranking feed), verified and rendered fully in-browser
agent_scenario: When you need: a physical trigger that always resolves to a fresh ranked list by fetching public data in-browser with verify-before-exec.
author: kody-w + Copilot
